title: News & Events | National Institutes of Health (NIH)
content: News & Events Recent News Releases NIH-funded breakthrough shrinks CRISPR for precision delivery in the body April 13, 2026 — Smaller gene-editing system could expand treatment options for cancer, ALS and other diseases. Low-cost care model reduces blood pressure in high-risk populations April 8, 2026 — NIH-supported clinical trial shows coordinated care strategy more effective than standard care NIH researchers discover pain-relieving drug with minimal addictive properties April 1, 2026 — Positive safety profile of novel drug compound is surprise for class of synthetic opioids shelved years ago. For the Media Media Inquiries Submit an interview request or request for comment. Images and B-roll Visit the NIH Flickr site to view free-to-use NIH health research images, b-roll, infographics, and videos. Calendar of Events NIH Institute-sponsored or related events held at or near NIH's Bethesda, Maryland, campus or online. NIH on Social Media A listing of social media, multimedia, and outreach pages from across NIH’s institutes, centers, and offices. NIH News Publications NIH News in Health A monthly newsletter of practical consumer health news and information based on NIH research. NIH Research Matters A weekly update of research advances from the National Institutes of Health. This page last reviewed on July 29, 2025
